accepted_recordings_single_target_check.name: accepted_recordings_single_target_check
accepted_recordings_single_target_check.value:
(
        "accepted_recordings"."roleplay_session_id" is not null
        and "accepted_recordings"."roleplay_line_id" is not null
        and "accepted_recordings"."memorization_session_id" is null
        and "accepted_recordings"."memorization_sentence_id" is null
      ) or (
        "accepted_recordings"."roleplay_session_id" is null
        and "accepted_recordings"."roleplay_line_id" is null
        and "accepted_recordings"."memorization_session_id" is not null
        and "accepted_recordings"."memorization_sentence_id" is not null
      )

analysis_jobs_single_session_check.name: analysis_jobs_single_session_check
analysis_jobs_single_session_check.value: ("analysis_jobs"."roleplay_session_id" is not null)::integer + ("analysis_jobs"."memorization_session_id" is not null)::integer = 1

analysis_jobs_completed_after_started_ch.name: analysis_jobs_completed_after_started_check
analysis_jobs_completed_after_started_ch.value: "analysis_jobs"."completed_at" is null or "analysis_jobs"."started_at" is null or "analysis_jobs"."completed_at" >= "analysis_jobs"."started_at"

analysis_jobs_failed_after_started_check.name: analysis_jobs_failed_after_started_check
analysis_jobs_failed_after_started_check.value: "analysis_jobs"."failed_at" is null or "analysis_jobs"."started_at" is null or "analysis_jobs"."failed_at" >= "analysis_jobs"."started_at"

draft_recordings_single_target_check.name: draft_recordings_single_target_check
draft_recordings_single_target_check.value:
(
        "draft_recordings"."roleplay_session_id" is not null
        and "draft_recordings"."roleplay_line_id" is not null
        and "draft_recordings"."memorization_session_id" is null
        and "draft_recordings"."memorization_sentence_id" is null
      ) or (
        "draft_recordings"."roleplay_session_id" is null
        and "draft_recordings"."roleplay_line_id" is null
        and "draft_recordings"."memorization_session_id" is not null
        and "draft_recordings"."memorization_sentence_id" is not null
      )

memorization_materials_status_deleted_at.name: memorization_materials_status_deleted_at_check
memorization_materials_status_deleted_at.value: ("memorization_materials"."status" = 'deleted' and "memorization_materials"."deleted_at" is not null) or ("memorization_materials"."status" = 'active' and "memorization_materials"."deleted_at" is null)

memorization_sessions_completed_after_st.name: memorization_sessions_completed_after_started_check
memorization_sessions_completed_after_st.value: "memorization_sessions"."completed_at" is null or "memorization_sessions"."started_at" is null or "memorization_sessions"."completed_at" >= "memorization_sessions"."started_at"

memorization_sessions_status_deleted_at_.name: memorization_sessions_status_deleted_at_check
memorization_sessions_status_deleted_at_.value: ("memorization_sessions"."status" = 'deleted' and "memorization_sessions"."deleted_at" is not null) or ("memorization_sessions"."status" <> 'deleted' and "memorization_sessions"."deleted_at" is null)

practice_target_analysis_results_single_.name: practice_target_analysis_results_single_target_check
practice_target_analysis_results_single_.value: ("practice_target_analysis_results"."roleplay_line_id" is not null)::integer + ("practice_target_analysis_results"."memorization_sentence_id" is not null)::integer = 1

roleplay_materials_status_deleted_at_che.name: roleplay_materials_status_deleted_at_check
roleplay_materials_status_deleted_at_che.value: ("roleplay_materials"."status" = 'deleted' and "roleplay_materials"."deleted_at" is not null) or ("roleplay_materials"."status" = 'active' and "roleplay_materials"."deleted_at" is null)

roleplay_sessions_completed_after_starte.name: roleplay_sessions_completed_after_started_check
roleplay_sessions_completed_after_starte.value: "roleplay_sessions"."completed_at" is null or "roleplay_sessions"."started_at" is null or "roleplay_sessions"."completed_at" >= "roleplay_sessions"."started_at"

roleplay_sessions_status_deleted_at_chec.name: roleplay_sessions_status_deleted_at_check
roleplay_sessions_status_deleted_at_chec.value: ("roleplay_sessions"."status" = 'deleted' and "roleplay_sessions"."deleted_at" is not null) or ("roleplay_sessions"."status" <> 'deleted' and "roleplay_sessions"."deleted_at" is null)

session_analysis_summaries_single_sessio.name: session_analysis_summaries_single_session_check
session_analysis_summaries_single_sessio.value: ("session_analysis_summaries"."roleplay_session_id" is not null)::integer + ("session_analysis_summaries"."memorization_session_id" is not null)::integer = 1
